locator.quote: The 76 % force-close aggregate rate is a direct consequence:

text: Every aggressive open posts its passive 20 ticks away regardless of microstructure; the 76% force-close aggregate rate is a direct consequence (20 ticks at 4.40 ≈ a 5.40 target vs LTP ~4.70).

locator.quote: the passive is far more likely to fill within the [open, T-120s]

text: Pinning arb_spread_scale=0.5 halves the target to ~10 ticks, so the passive is far more likely to fill within the [open, T-120s] window because it's closer to where the market trades.
